`tests/test_analysis_scan.py` also lacks a regression that drives `scan_model()` through router-tensor shape failures enforced by `Gemma4Backend.extract_router_state()` / `validate_layer()` in `src/moe_surgeon/models/gemma4.py:262-289` and `:373-396`.
